name: Krishna GSVV
title: I'm Krishna GSVV — CS student, builder & hackathon champion
bio: Final-year B.Tech Computer Science student at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham (GPA: 8.53/10, graduating Jul 2026), based in Bengaluru. I build full-stack applications and AI systems that solve real problems — from browser extensions to deep learning pipelines. I've competed at the national level and won: 1st runner-up at IIT Delhi CodeHive, 2nd runner-up at Tredence InfinityAI 2025 (₹2,00,000 prize), 1st at IIT Hyderabad Pathway Hackathon, and 1st at Microsoft Imagine Cup campus round — ₹3.20L+ in prizes across 2025. On the research side, my deep learning work on diabetic retinopathy prediction is published on IEEE, and the EquiLens bias-detection corpus is released on Zenodo. I maintain open-source tools people actually use — cSpell Sync has 1.5K+ VS Code Marketplace installs, and I'm LeetCode 150+ with HackerRank 5-star Python & SQL. My stack centers on React, Python, Node.js, and cloud (AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner, OCI Certified Architect Associate). Whether it's a VS Code extension, an ML pipeline, or a blockchain gateway — I care about code that's clean, fast, and worth shipping.
